description: Style NoteAdd a sophisticated polish to your minimalist look this season with this lucera ring. Styled to refine your ensemble, don't save it just for the special dates - wear this with your denim and tee staples too. Up the style bar with this lovely piece and style it with tonal accessories.   Product DetailsSilver band which converges at the front centreThree centre stones with the second one being the largestMaterial and CareSilver, CZ diamondsWipe with a cotton swab to remove dust
